{{Item
| image = Bowtie.png
| id = bowtie
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
| Description = Sneak while applying this on your Dog to give it another variant of the Accessory.
}}

'''Bowtie''' is a dyable equipable material that you wear on your dog.
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Strings <br>+ Wool
| [[File:Bowtie crafting.png]]
|}
[[File:Bowtie equipped.png|thumb|431x431px|Doggo with fancy bowtie!]]

== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Used In ==
* [[File:Bowtie demo2.png|thumb|428x428px|Festive Doggos!]][[Conan Suit]]
== Trivia ==
* It was added to DTN 1.11.0.
* The Head Bowtie variant is added in DTN 1.18.39.
